title: Add main branch protection desired-state file matching live GitHub rules

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fetching live main branch protection/ruleset config from GitHub and creating infra desired-state JSON to match exact current protections and required checks.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Added infra/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json based on live ruleset id 13256471. Included exact bypass actor/team and required_status_checks contexts: check (py 3.10), check (py 3.11), check (py 3.12). JSON validated locally.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Adding .github/workflows/ruleset-sync.yml wrapper for platform-ci reusable ruleset sync targeting infra/github-rulesets/*.json.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Added .github/workflows/ruleset-sync.yml using platform-ci reusable ruleset sync (check/apply) for infra/github-rulesets/*.json. Validated workflow YAML and ruleset JSON locally.
